ModMetaData.name: Wolfein Race (HSK/CE Patched, All-in-One)
ModMetaData.author: MelonDove, Ancot — HSK/CE patch by CarbineAction; CE patches by leaople
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE-patched all-in-one fork of the Wolfein Race mod.
ABSORBED MODS (do not enable separately): - Wolfein Race (workshop 3473140562, MelonDove + Ancot) - Wolfein Race Gene Patch (workshop 3473178683, Ancot) - Wolfein CE Patches (workshop 3485371294, leaople)
All three are bundled. Disable the originals and enable this fork instead.
--- HSK-NATIVE WEAPON RECIPES ---
All 70 Wolfein weapons reworked to follow HSK's class-component pipeline:
HG (homemade + industrial) + Pistol_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic HG charge + Pistol_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic SMG industrial + SMG_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic SMG charge + SMG_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic SG industrial + Shotgun_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic SG charge + Shotgun_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic AR homemade + Rifle_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic AR industrial + AdvRifle_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic AR charge + AdvRifle_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic RF homemade + Rifle_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic RF industrial + Sniper_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic RF charge + AdvSniper_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic MG industrial + Heavy_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic MG charge + Heavy_Component + Charged_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic Launcher (Grenade/Missile) + Launcher_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic TaserGun (HG-class) + Pistol_Component + Weapon_Parts + Plastic Longbow + Weapon_Parts + Plastic Grenades + Weapon_Parts + Plastic Melee Tier I (Simple variants) + Weapon_Parts Melee Tier III (Heavy + AIPT) + Weapon_Parts
Wolfein_AlloyMaterials and ComponentIndustrial counts preserved as the racial prestige material — alloy is now an additive on top of the HSK component pipeline rather than a substitute.
--- HSK-NATIVE APPAREL RECIPES ---
~75 apparel items across 5 layers (OnSkin, OverHead, Shell, Sundry, Underwear) reworked:
Tactical/Military uniforms + Plastic Goggles + Helmets + Plastic + Electronics (goggles only) Power Armor (all variants) + Mechanism + Microchips (Imperial only) GasMask + Plastic (filter) ShieldBelt + Mechanism
Wolfein_CompositeFabric preserved as the racial prestige textile.
--- INGREDIENT SWAPS ---
Raw <Steel> -> refined <SteelBar> at 1:5 (HSK convention; Steel is iron ore, SteelBar is the smelted product). Raw <Uranium> -> refined <DepletedUranium> at 1:1 (matches HSK's MakeDepletedUraniumAlloy 10:10 ratio).
--- BENCH ROUTING ---
HG / SMG / SG -> HSK WeaponCraftingWorkTable AR / RF / MG / Launcher -> HSK AdvWeaponCraftingWorkTable Charge variants -> HSK AdvWeaponCraftingWorkTable Melee weapons -> HSK ElectricSmithy Apparel (tactical+) -> HSK ElectricTailoringBench Apparel (basic civilian) -> HSK HandTailoringBench Wolfein_AlloyMaterials -> HSK ElectricSmithy Wolfein_CompositeFabric -> HSK ElectricTailoringBench
Wolfein's own crafting bench (Wolfein_TableMachining) is hidden from the architect menu.
--- BUNDLED CE PATCHES ---
leaople's Wolfein CE Patches (workshop 3485371294) bundled into Patches-CE/, gated by IfModActive="CETeam.CombatExtended" in loadFolders.xml. Covers 70+ apparel + weapon CE adjustments + 1 grenade ammo def.
--- BUNDLED GENE PATCH ---
Ancot's Wolfein Race Gene Patch (workshop 3473178683) bundled into 1.5/Defs/GeneDefs/ + XenotypeDefs/ + Patches/. Adds Wolfein-specific genes and the Wolfein xenotype, integrated with vanilla Biotech.
--- COMPATIBILITY ---
Requires: HSK (skyarkhangel.hsk), Combat Extended (CETeam.CombatExtended), Harmony, Humanoid Alien Races, Biotech DLC.
NOT compatible with: - MelonDove.WolfeinRace (original Wolfein Race) — disable, enable this instead - Ancot.WolfeinRaceGenePatch (gene patch) — bundled, do not enable separately - leaople.WolfeinCEPatch (CE patches) — bundled, do not enable separately
